ground_truth.title: 6 Best Personal Trainer Certifications
ground_truth.author: Hannah Daugherty
ground_truth.main_content: The best personal trainer certifications are highly recognized within the fitness industry and allow you to design training programs, guide clients through workouts, and build a fitness business – whether in a gym, online, or in your own studio. The quality of your certification can shape not only your knowledge but also your job prospects, salary, and credibility. Choosing the proper certification is crucial for success, so we've ranked six top certified personal training programs based on what matters most to aspiring trainers: getting certified quickly, keeping costs reasonable, and actually landing a job. Our research-driven scoring system evaluates each certification across six practical factors that directly impact your career success – from how fast you can start working to the salary you can expect to earn. ISSA (International Sports Science Association) - Rating: 9.8 - Our Unanimous Top Choice - Features: Flexible payment plan options, Highly-rated support, Modest CEU requirement. NASM (National Academy of Sports Medicine) - Rating: 9.5 - High Industry Recognition - Features: Utilizes the OPT Model, Most recognized certification, Trainer salaries rank highly. NCSF (National Council on Strength & Fitness) - Rating: 9.2 - Highest Reviews + Lowest Cost - Features: Great for training athletes, Novel holistic education program, Generous study period. National Personal Trainer Institute - Rating: 8.9 - Features: Live hands-on training, Department of Education recognized, Diploma and certification given. Fitness Mentors - Rating: 8.9 - Features: Highest exam pass rate, Lowest cost cert, Best customer support. NSCA (National Strength & Conditioning Association) - Rating: 8.7 - Features: Online and Self Paced, Affordable Payment Plans, Non-Proctored Exam. 87,455 People have used this article to select a personal trainer certification.
